interpretation: Original paper number is the dimensional ribbon slot address.

records.dimensional_role: 0x ten-window closure/lift
records.state_bound_action: close and lift the preceding ten-window into a replayable receipt state
records.proof_form_required: aggregate receipt and open-slot preservation
